days.text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. One or two showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 4 to 5 southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
